scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @claimproof/shared && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @claimproof/shared && npm run test --workspace @claimproof/shared && npm run test --workspace server && npm run test --workspace client && npm run typecheck --workspace mobile && npm run test --workspace mobile
